data.name: Hentai Shinobi
data.detailed_description:
Step into the seductive shadows with a gorgeous ninja girl who reveals herself only to those skilled enough to solve her puzzles. Hentai Shinobi is an erotic puzzle game where every move brings you closer to uncovering intimate, spicy artwork of our alluring shinobi.

Relaxing gameplay, sensual atmosphere, and beautiful adult illustrations blend together to create a smooth, addictive experience.

Game Features:

1.Erotic Illustrations

Unlock steamy artwork featuring the shinobi in provocative poses and sensual scenes.
Every puzzle completed reveals more of her curves, expressions, and secrets.

2.Three Puzzle Modes

• 15-Puzzle (Sliding Puzzle) – The classic challenge with a sexy twist.
• Swipe Puzzle – Drag and swap pieces to assemble the full image.
• Rotate Puzzle – Turn each tile to the correct angle to reveal intimate moments.

3.Two Difficulty Levels

• 3×3 – Quick, satisfying reveals.
• 4×4 – More challenging, more teasing, and more rewarding.

4.Sensual Background Music

Soft, relaxing melodies enhance the erotic mood and make the experience even more immersive.

data.short_description: Sexy shinobi puzzle game. Solve 15-puzzle, swipe and rotate modes to reveal spicy art. Two difficulties and soothing music.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 10100F/AMD Ruzen 3 3100
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1060/RX 480
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
